commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But go you now unto my place which was in Shiloh, where I set my name at the first, and see what I did to it for the wickedness of my people Israel. Beginning, under Josue. (Haydock) The sins of a few priests caused this place to be abandoned, (1 Kings ii. , and Psalm lxxvii. ) and shall the crimes of a whole people escape. (Calmet) It is true, that place and Jerusalem were once sanctified: but the people being criminal, God retires. (Worthington).
